---
title: "Elizabeth Collins"
---

## Elizabeth Collins

**Dates:** (b. 1846)

### Description

housemaid

### Biography

See Martha Collins and Anne Collins;  it seems likely that she was the Bessie Collins at Mary Anne Dyson’s school in 1853;  and in 1871 housemaid to the Rev. John Le Mesurier, Vicar of Bembridge. [1851, 71 census]

### Letters

- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from February 24, 1854.
- Letter from January 15, 1853.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
